title: Whimsical Fantasy Illustration Soft Painterly Style Warm
sourceTitle: Whimsical Fantasy Illustration Soft Painterly Style Warm
prompt: Whimsical fantasy illustration, soft painterly style, warm luminous lighting. A treehouse nestled high in an ancient gnarled oak, glowing with golden magical light, lavender lanterns strung along rope bridges and winding staircases. Misty violet sky visible through the canopy of an enchanted forest. A small owl perched near the treehouse entrance. The treehouse features a crooked copper weathervane and moss-covered wooden walls draped in flowering wisteria vines. Firefly bokeh, ethereal atmosphere, storybook charm. No text unless specifically requested except on signing and decorative items. --ar 3:4 --profile 362c2i1 pz8oy84 eynj9qn dc6okxb sf5lk2z 9nv6snq nj4ajrt fey4r6j --v 8
